seo.title: Case Studies | AInspiration
seo.description: Discover how SMEs are transforming their businesses with our AI solutions.

pageSubtitle: Discover how companies like yours are transforming their business with our AI solutions

study1.title: Customer Service Optimisation with an AI Chatbot
study1.challenge: Faced with rapid growth, CommerceXpress struggled to respond effectively to customer enquiries, resulting in long response times and declining customer satisfaction.
study1.solution: Implementation of an AI chatbot capable of handling 80% of routine enquiries, integrated with the website and social media, with intelligent escalation to human agents.
study1.result3: Annual saving of €45k in support costs
study1.quote: Our AI chatbot has become indispensable. It instantly answers frequently asked questions, freeing our teams for complex enquiries. Customer satisfaction has soared and our costs have fallen.
study1.author: Head of Customer Service, CommerceXpress

study2.title: Invoice Management Automation
study2.challenge: TechnoServic was manually processing over 500 invoices per month, causing payment delays, costly errors and tying up two full-time employees.
study2.solution: Deployment of an AI solution for automatic invoice data extraction, integrated with the existing accounting system, with intelligent validation and automatic classification.
study2.quote: Our accounts department has been transformed. The AI extracts and processes invoice data with remarkable accuracy, freeing our teams for more strategic analysis.
study2.author: Chief Financial Officer, TechnoServic

study3.title: Stock Optimisation Through Predictive Analytics
study3.challenge: MobiliFrance suffered from frequent stockouts on popular items whilst tying up too much capital in slow-moving products.
study3.solution: Implementation of an AI-based predictive analytics system integrating historical data, seasonal trends and external factors to optimise stock management.
study3.result4: Fast return on investment from the first year
study3.quote: Predictive AI has revolutionised our stock management. We now accurately anticipate demand, avoiding stockouts whilst optimising our inventory levels.
study3.author: Supply Chain Manager, MobiliFrance
